calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioners: Ivette Litza Fernandez and Kenneth Alan Scofield, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor: Ashley Elizabeth Scofield, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Micaela Ashley Scofield.
Decree signed in open court
